emails.subject: Communicating Effectively course offering
emails.body: Communicating Effectively course offering Daren- There is an effective communication course on December 7 (Thursday) from 1-5pm. Is this the one you suggested for me, and if it is, may I attend this one? Please let me know. It is listed through Ernie and is $200. Thanks for looking into this.

emails.subject: Re: Communicating Effectively course offering
emails.body: Re: Communicating Effectively course offering This is the course. The 7th is fine. I also have Brandy looking into the tuition reimbursement deal. Apparantly, the person she needs to talk to is out of the office. D Stacey Neuweiler 11/21/2000 04:36 PM
